title: Jordan, Bahrain and Kuwait deal with attacks — Arab News
snippet: Arab News reports on how Jordan, Bahrain, and Kuwait responded to Iranian retaliatory strikes. Covers regional diplomatic fallout and defense measures. Jordan intercepted 5 missiles with no casualties. Duplicate coverage of src-1692.
tag_reason: src-1692 이란 보복 공격의 중복 보도 — Arab News 아랍 지역 시각
